name: Baked Avocado Fries
description: A crispy, low-fat baked treat that mimics the technique used in eggplant parmesan.
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F and set up three bowls in a line next to a rimmed baking sheet with a wire rack insert.
In the first small bowl, combine flour, chili powder, sea salt, and pepper, then set aside.
In the second small bowl, whisk eggs until smooth.
In the third small bowl, place panko breadcrumbs.
Cut avocados in half and slice into 5 to 6 wedges per side.
Working in batches, place avocado wedges in bowl with flour mixture, turning to coat evenly.
Transfer to the second bowl with eggs and turn to coat, then finally coat with panko.
Place coated wedge on wire rack placed over a rimmed baking sheet and repeat with remaining wedges.
Bake at 425°F until golden brown, about 16 to 18 minutes.
Remove and let cool slightly before serving plain or with your favorite dip.
